trades.reasoning: Score 100 with all five bullish signals including volume surge and RSI 64.3 in momentum zone; deploying the remaining $298 cash opportunistically despite a soft market day.

decisions.briefing: Both indices closed modestly lower (S&P -0.7%, NASDAQ -0.9%) in a neutral-to-cautious session. Cash is below the $500 reload threshold so only one small buy is warranted — MRNA, which prints a perfect 100 score with a volume surge on a down day, suggesting institutional accumulation against the tape. All seven existing positions remain intact with no stop-loss signals triggered.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pulled back modestly on Thursday as investors digested mixed economic signals, with the NASDAQ underperforming the S&P 500 slightly amid ongoing uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate-cut timing. Treasury yields held firm, keeping pressure on growth and tech names. Despite the broad weakness, select healthcare and biotech stocks showed unusual volume surges, suggesting money rotating defensively into perceived value plays.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股周四小幅回落，投資者在消化參差不齊的經濟數據之際態度審慎，那斯達克指數跌幅略大於標普500，市場對聯準會降息時間點的不確定性持續壓抑成長股情緒。公債殖利率維持高位，進一步制約科技類股表現。儘管大盤走弱，部分醫療及生技股出現異常大量，顯示資金有防禦性輪動跡象。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Accumulation on weakness refers to institutional investors quietly buying shares of a stock even when the broader market is falling. A telltale sign is a volume surge on a down market day — it suggests 'smart money' is positioning before a move higher. MRNA's volume spike today while the S&P dropped -0.7% is a textbook example.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「逆市吸籌」是指機構投資者在大盤下跌時悄悄買入個股的行為。判斷訊號之一是在市場走弱的日子出現異常大量，代表「聰明錢」正在佈局等待上漲。今天MRNA在標普跌0.7%的環境下出現成交量急增，正是教科書式的逆市吸籌案例。
